summary: Iteration 21 - P0 Features Testing (Visual Identity Layer, Hook Readability, Pexels Caching). All 17 backend tests passed. Code review verified all 3 P0 features are correctly implemented. Frontend loads correctly and shows AI Mode vs Library/My Media mode selection.
passed_tests: Backend: Login works with test@example.com / test123456
Backend: /api/stock/search/photos endpoint exists (returns 400 - no Pexels API key configured, expected)
Backend: /api/stock/search/videos endpoint exists (returns 400 - no Pexels API key configured, expected)
Backend: /api/video/assemble accepts videoStyle field (cinematic_warm, dreamy, vintage, moody, raw, none)
Backend: All 6 videoStyle values accepted without validation errors
Backend: AI mode assembly (no libraryClipPaths) works without videoStyle
Backend: Pexels cache key format verified (photos:{query}:{page}:{per_page})
Backend: Pexels cache TTL verified (24 hours)
Backend: All 5 style filters defined (cinematic_warm, dreamy, vintage, moody, raw)
Backend: Library mode detection logic verified (bool(libraryClipPaths))
Backend: Drawbox parameters verified (pad_y=16, width=900, color=black@0.5)
Backend: Drawbox enable expression format verified
Backend: pexels_cache indexes defined (cache_key unique, expires_at TTL)
Backend: API root endpoint returns 200
Backend: GET /api/effects/list returns effects (regression)
Backend: GET /api/projects returns projects list (regression)
Frontend: Mode selection page shows AI Mode and Library/My Media options
Code Review: Video Style selector only renders when isLibrary=true (line 726)
Code Review: videoStyle added to payload only in Library mode (lines 252-255)
Code Review: Live preview shows background pill (lines 677-695)
Code Review: Style tint overlay in preview (lines 622-635)
critical_code_review_comments: P0 Feature 1 (Visual Identity Layer) VERIFIED: videoStyle field in AssembleVideoRequest model (line 2748), style_filters dict with 5 styles (lines 2862-2889), filters applied only when is_library_mode and videoStyle != 'none' (lines 2859-2893)

P0 Feature 2 (Hook Readability) VERIFIED: drawbox filter with black@0.5 background pill (lines 2982-2998), positioned behind text block with 16px padding and 900px width, enable expression uses between(t,start,end) for timing

P0 Feature 3 (Pexels Caching) VERIFIED: PEXELS_CACHE_TTL_HOURS=24 (line 547), cache_key format 'photos/videos:{query}:{page}:{per_page}' (lines 556, 608), MongoDB upsert with expires_at (lines 593-597, 655-658), TTL index on expires_at (line 3430)
Frontend Video Style selector correctly conditional on isLibrary (line 726), 6 style options with data-testid attributes (lines 736-767)
Frontend payload correctly includes videoStyle only in Library mode (lines 252-255)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 21 verified 3 P0 features: (1) Visual Identity Layer - videoStyle field with 5 styles (cinematic_warm, dreamy, vintage, moody, raw) applied via FFmpeg filters only in Library mode, (2) Hook Readability - drawbox background pill with black@0.5 color behind hook text, (3) Pexels Caching - MongoDB pexels_cache collection with 24h TTL, cache_key unique index, expires_at TTL index. Note: Pexels API key is empty in test environment so actual Pexels API calls return 400, but caching logic is verified through code review. All backend tests passed. Frontend mode selection (AI vs Library) works correctly.

verified_features.visual_identity_layer: VERIFIED - videoStyle field in AssembleVideoRequest, 5 style filters (cinematic_warm, dreamy, vintage, moody, raw), applied only in Library mode
verified_features.hook_readability_drawbox: VERIFIED - drawbox filter with color=black@0.5, t=fill, 900px width, 16px padding, enable='between(t,start,end)'
verified_features.pexels_caching: VERIFIED - PEXELS_CACHE_TTL_HOURS=24, cache_key format, MongoDB upsert with expires_at, TTL index on expires_at
verified_features.frontend_video_style_selector: VERIFIED - Conditional on isLibrary (line 726), 6 options with data-testid, payload includes videoStyle only in Library mode
verified_features.frontend_live_preview_pill: VERIFIED - Background pill with rgba(0,0,0,0.5) in preview (lines 677-695)
verified_features.frontend_style_tint_overlay: VERIFIED - Style-specific tint colors in preview (lines 622-635)
